list.name: Changes
list.comment: Clean up deprecated UI components, routes, and configuration files that are no longer used in the application.

task.summary: Default task
Set up project skeleton with TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS, and initial routes
SHOP DONE STATIC DATA ONLY, STATIC COMPONENT, NO INTERACTION
Add Feature Cart
Add Vercel Deployment
Add Vercel Deployment 1
Added Dark Mode
Added the Original Logo and Burger Menu Drawer in Mobile
Added active and add to cart button simplified
Added active and add to cart button simplified
added the images assets and added ui componensts (CHIP and BADGE) added the wishlist store and recolor the web
added not found component
added accent at the top of cart drawer
badges updated to red
recolor and added loader for testing
recolor and added loader for testing
recolor and added loader for testing

Updated company branding to “Triumphs Co.” throughout the app, added a full search bar with route validation and filter handling, enhanced `ShopFilters` and loaders, added left‑icon support to inputs, and updated product card routing and state handling.
fix navbar positioning
add an about page

Add sustainability & contact pages, extend constants with FAQ, contact details, and commitments, and update the About page layout, CTA, and navigation styling. Also improve input styling and update the route tree accordingly.

Add sustainability & contact pages, extend constants with FAQ, contact details, and commitments, and update the About page layout, CTA, and navigation styling. Also improve input styling and update the route tree accordingly.

Add sustainability & contact pages, extend constants with FAQ, contact details, and commitments, and update the About page layout, CTA, and navigation styling. Also improve input styling and update the route tree accordingly.
Add framer‑motion animations to cart drawer, mobile nav drawer, hero carousel, and page elements for smoother transitions and improved visual flow.
Added Skeleton Loading changed the Loading from Generic to Skeleton
Added Skeleton Loading changed the Loading from Generic to Skeleton
Added SEO and Wishlist Page
Added SEO and Wishlist Page

Modularize state stores and add toast notification system
- Split the combined store into separate modules: useCartStore, useWishlistStore, useUIStore, useAuthStore, useToastStore - Add UUID support for unique toast IDs - Introduce ToastProvider and toast utilities - Update components, routes, and providers to use the new stores and toast functions - Add toast styling and update imports throughout the project - Adjust CSS variables for toast themes and animations

Refactor ThemeProvider to a stateless root‑wrapper: - Remove `children` prop and adjust its implementation. - Clean up JSX in `__root.tsx` (self‑closing tags and redundant wrapper). - Update imports accordingly.
Add ErrorComponent, enable root error handling, update layout exports and manifest, remove Review type and favicon.
Switch shop filters from style → subcategory array; update constants, routes, and product data to use the new subcategory structure and reset default filter values.
Switch shop filters from style → subcategory array; update constants, routes, and product data to use the new subcategory structure and reset default filter values.
Add Facebook link to footer and update social media text to “Follow us on Social Media”
Refactor global type declarations: move SVGProps and ShopSearch into globals.d.ts, delete the legacy type module, and update icon and route imports to use the shared globals.

Refactor UI components and layout
- Remove unused imports and simplify component signatures (e.g., `ErrorComponent` no longer requires an error prop). - Integrate `GlareCard` into shop route and update imports. - Update toast styling and class names (`toast__${toast.type}`). - Modernize cart drawer: add proper links to product pages, adjust positioning classes, and clean up markup. - Adjust mobile navigation drawer accent bar and overlay handling. - Add required imports and class names (`Banner` now typed with `React.FC`). - Improve spacing in `about` and `product-card` components and clean up trailing whitespace. - Minor tweaks to `index.tsx` and banner layout for consistent styling.
Drop unused GlareCard export and imports, update Footer styling, and add Button import to About page.
Clean up deprecated UI components, routes, and configuration files that are no longer used in the application.

MESSAGE.value: Added active and add to cart button simplified
added the images assets and added ui componensts (CHIP and BADGE) added the wishlist store and recolor the web
added not found component
added accent at the top of cart drawer
badges updated to red
recolor and added loader for testing

Updated company branding to “Triumphs Co.” throughout the app, added a full search bar with route validation and filter handling, enhanced `ShopFilters` and loaders, added left‑icon support to inputs, and updated product card routing and state handling.
fix navbar positioning
add an about page

Add sustainability & contact pages, extend constants with FAQ, contact details, and commitments, and update the About page layout, CTA, and navigation styling. Also improve input styling and update the route tree accordingly.
Add framer‑motion animations to cart drawer, mobile nav drawer, hero carousel, and page elements for smoother transitions and improved visual flow.
Change
Added Skeleton Loader, Change Loader from Generic Loader to Await for dynamic data loading
Added Skeleton Loading changed the Loading from Generic to Skeleton
Added SEO and Wishlist Page

Modularize state stores and add toast notification system
- Split the combined store into separate modules: useCartStore, useWishlistStore, useUIStore, useAuthStore, useToastStore - Add UUID support for unique toast IDs - Introduce ToastProvider and toast utilities - Update components, routes, and providers to use the new stores and toast functions - Add toast styling and update imports throughout the project - Adjust CSS variables for toast themes and animations

Refactor ThemeProvider to a stateless root‑wrapper: - Remove `children` prop and adjust its implementation. - Clean up JSX in `__root.tsx` (self‑closing tags and redundant wrapper). - Update imports accordingly.
Add ErrorComponent, enable root error handling, update layout exports and manifest, remove Review type and favicon.
Switch shop filters from style → subcategory array; update constants, routes, and product data to use the new subcategory structure and reset default filter values.
Add Facebook link to footer and update social media text to “Follow us on Social Media”
Refactor global type declarations: move SVGProps and ShopSearch into globals.d.ts, delete the legacy type module, and update icon and route imports to use the shared globals.

Refactor component implementations and improve navigation
- Update component type signatures to `React.FC` and drop unused imports - Consolidate and clean up comment blocks across several UI files - Simplify toast styling and progress bar logic - Add `useCallback` for product list rendering in shop route - Remove unnecessary `setTimeout` around navigation - Replace direct DOM rendering in `CartDrawer` with `Link` navigation and parameter handling - Minor UI class refactor in mobile nav drawer and banner for consistency and accessibility

Refactor UI components and layout
- Remove unused imports and simplify component signatures (e.g., `ErrorComponent` no longer requires an error prop). - Integrate `GlareCard` into shop route and update imports. - Update toast styling and class names (`toast__${toast.type}`). - Modernize cart drawer: add proper links to product pages, adjust positioning classes, and clean up markup. - Adjust mobile navigation drawer accent bar and overlay handling. - Add required imports and class names (`Banner` now typed with `React.FC`). - Improve spacing in `about` and `product-card` components and clean up trailing whitespace. - Minor tweaks to `index.tsx` and banner layout for consistent styling.
Drop unused GlareCard export and imports, update Footer styling, and add Button import to About page.
Clean up deprecated UI components, routes, and configuration files that are no longer used in the application.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Clean up deprecated UI components, routes, and configuration files that are no longer used in the application.
